objections.rate:
Rate/Byaj Zyada Hai:

Reframe karo: "Bhaiya, rate se zyada faida dekho."

Hisaab dikhao:
- Tractor EMI = Rs.11,000/month
- Apna tractor hone se fasal = Rs.2-3 lakh zyada
- EMI ek hafte mein nikal aayi!

Phir poochho: "Kaunsi bank ne kam rate diya? Batao â MMFSL negotiate bhi karta hai."

Kabhi defend mat karo â return dikhao.
objections.trust:
"Yeh wahi Mahindra hai jiska tractor aapke khet mein chal raha hai â 32 saal purani, NSE/BSE listed, RBI registered, 1 crore+ customers."

Local proof: "Aapke gaon mein bhi customers hain â unse pooch lo."

Mahindra naam hi trust hai.
objections.budget:
"Isliye toh MMFSL hai â aaj ek paisa nahi chahiye. Sirf kagaz do, 2 din mein loan pass."

EMI choti karo: 5 saal = Rs.5,000-6,000/month
Harvest EMI: pehle 6 mahine ZERO!

"Abhi paisa nahi" = "abhi loan lo" â yeh unhe samjhao.
objections.delay:
Urgency banao: "Bilkul sochiye bhaiya. Bas â yeh scheme [date] tak hai, baad mein EMI zyada."

Appointment fix karo: "Kal subah 10 baje ya shaam 5 baje?" â do options do. Aaj hi confirm karo.
objections.bank:
Bank vs MMFSL:
- Bank mein ITR chahiye â MMFSL mein zameen ke kagaz
- Bank ke chakkar â MMFSL ghar aata hai
- Bank 2-3 hafte â MMFSL 2 working days
- Bank rural nahi â MMFSL 4 lakh+ gaon

"Bank ne kitne chakkar lagwaye? MMFSL mein ek baar aao â ghar baith ke ho jaayega."
objections.other:
Reluctant Customer:

1. Problem sunno: "Aaj bina tractor ke kya takleef hai?" â sunne do.
2. Numbers dikhao: "Apna tractor = Rs.X kiraya bachega + Rs.Y fasal zyada"
3. Easy step: "Sirf Aadhaar lao aaj â koi aur kuch nahi."

Simplicity = conversion.
